title: Midnight Madness
description: Demons, souls, horrors, death... Face the fear, mortal!
body:
![Midnight Madness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f254b4974712d77a4ea366df0f3970336a4ddd84.png)

![Description 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89f0812012f49d6c88d20e6af8e8159016e77a6_0.webp)

![Description 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4b48024dd6b62e5a53255815cf1d64b81e3406e_0.webp)

![Description 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76bfb1575d38dbf611c4a5783b72588a7da4ee15_0.webp)

**Midnight Madness requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**

**Latest version of Midnight Madness is compatible with:**
- [Nonexistent+](https://modrinth.com/mod/nonexistent+)
- [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)

Mobs from these mods will drop souls, if the compatibility is enabled in config file (**Midnight Madness Compatibility**).

**Supported languages:**
- English
- Russian

**[Made with MCreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/96084/midnight-madness)**
